title: AR's OreUI
description: GUI resource pack based on early look of OreUI update
body:
# AR's OreUI(AmongstReality's OreUI)

[![AR's OreUI on Modrinth](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/modrinth@2x.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui)
[![AR's OreUI on CurseForge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/curseforge@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ars-oreui)
[![amongstreality on Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/patreon@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![amongstreality on Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/bmc@2x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

GUI resource pack based on early look of OreUI update. You can look it up here [Minecraft Wiki - OreUI](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ore_UI).

> ❗ **Important:** the resource pack REQUIRES [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui). If you don't use it, chest, trapped chest, ender chest and barrel, etc., will have the same generic texture.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** this resource pack is only available for download on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui) and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ars-oreui) and has its own page on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ar-s-ore-ui-1-21-2-v1-0-early-access/). If you find it on any other platform - **do not download it** from them, because they redistribute it unofficially and unauthorized. The download links may lead to malicious websites and the content you download may contain viruses.

## You can support me and my projects here:

[![Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/patreon@3x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/bmc@3x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

Author AmongstReality

When you can use my assets:

- In public Modpacks on Modrinth/CurseForge.
- If you want to add mod support as an addon for the resource pack. If you do that, you have to add clear credit that
  includes links to the original resource pack.
- Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

When you can **NOT** use my assets:

- Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace.
- Locking behind a paywall (e.g. Patreon).
- Distribution of original/modified assets on any platforms.

Links to the resource pack's pages on different platforms:

- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ars-oreui)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui)

</details>
